overall.description: First-person exploration of a cozy, wood-paneled fantasy common room with arched doorways and warm ambient lighting. The player discovers a hidden sweets room, explores a grand hall with NPCs relaxing on furniture, and enters a bedroom area through a curved brick tunnel.

scene_state.functional_zone: cozy common room with velvet sofas and wooden pillars

events.description: approaching and opening the bookshelf door leading to the Secret Sweets Room

agents.ego_description: walking through the common room toward a hidden door disguised as a bookshelf

notable_agents.action: student in dark robes standing near the sofa facing away from the camera

entered.detail: green and gold striped sofa with wooden frame
thick wooden support beams with intricate Celtic knot carvings
tall wooden bookshelf that serves as a hidden door
ornate hanging light fixture with multiple lamps

segments.scene_description: The player walks through a warm, wood-paneled common room featuring a striped velvet sofa and carved wooden pillars. A student stands near the center as the camera approaches a bookshelf that serves as a secret door.

scene_state.functional_zone: hidden confectionery room with botanical decor and stained glass ceiling

events.description: entering the Secret Sweets Room through the bookshelf door
camera tilts up to reveal bright light streaming through stained glass ceiling window

agents.ego_description: examining the secret room's cakes, stacked books, and ornate stained glass ceiling

entered.detail: orange velvet armchair with curved wooden frame
three-tiered stand displaying pink and white cakes
tall stacks of leather-bound books reaching to the ceiling
triangular stained glass ceiling window with green and gold floral patterns
large illustrated poster showing plant specimens
arched wooden door with decorative iron hinges

segments.scene_description: Inside the Secret Sweets Room, the camera pans across velvet armchairs, towering stacks of books, and a tiered cake stand. The player looks up at a beautiful stained glass skylight before examining botanical posters and a carved wooden door.

scene_state.functional_zone: common room area with grandfather clock and spiral staircase

events.description: exiting the Secret Sweets Room back into the main common room

agents.ego_description: moving through the common room past a tall grandfather clock toward a circular stone doorway

entered.detail: tall wooden grandfather clock with brass face and pendulum
wooden spiral stairs leading to an upper balcony
large circular stone archway leading to another area

segments.scene_description: Returning to the main common room, the player passes a prominent grandfather clock and potted cacti, heading toward a large circular stone doorway that leads to a grand hall.

scene_state.functional_zone: grand hall with multiple arched doorways and upper balcony

events.description: passing through the circular doorway into the large grand hall
turning right to observe NPCs sitting on sofas in the hall

agents.ego_description: entering a spacious hall and observing other students relaxing on furniture

notable_agents.action: group of three students sitting on a sofa conversing with each other
individual student sitting in an armchair near a table

entered.detail: circular woven rug with green and gold patterns
ornate wooden railing on the upper level overlooking the hall
several large arched doorways with stained glass panels
large curved wooden chest with metal bands
massive circular wooden door with intricate ironwork and stained glass

segments.scene_description: The player enters a grand hall with a high ceiling and multiple arched doorways. Groups of students sit on sofas conversing, while ornate lamps and potted trees decorate the space. The camera pans across the room showing the balcony level above.

scene_state.functional_zone: curved brick tunnel leading to dormitory bedroom

events.description: entering the arched brick tunnel with wall sconce lighting
entering the bedroom area through the tunnel doorway

agents.ego_description: walking through a curved corridor and entering a bedroom with multiple canopy beds

entered.detail: curved corridor with brick walls and arched ceiling supports
brass wall-mounted lamps providing warm lighting
wooden bed with green canopy and white pillows
tall wooden cabinet with carved doors
arched window with colorful stained glass panels

segments.scene_description: The player enters a narrow brick tunnel with warm sconce lighting, then emerges into a dormitory bedroom featuring canopy beds, wooden wardrobes, and a stained glass window. The room has hexagonal floor tiles and cozy armchairs.

scene_state.functional_zone: return through tunnel to grand hall with large decorated door

events.description: exiting the bedroom back into the curved brick tunnel
re-entering the grand hall from the tunnel corridor

agents.ego_description: returning through the corridor and approaching the large decorated door in the main hall

entered.detail: massive circular wooden door with intricate ironwork and green stained glass panels
simple wooden bench against the tunnel wall
tall green bamboo plants in pots flanking the doorway

segments.scene_description: The player exits the bedroom and walks back through the curved tunnel, re-entering the grand hall. The camera approaches a large decorated door with stained glass panels, passing wooden benches and potted bamboo plants.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a cozy, wood-paneled common room through a series of hidden and grand architectural spaces. It begins by moving past a striped velvet sofa and carved pillars toward a secret bookshelf door, which opens into a hidden sweets room filled with tiered cakes and a stained glass skylight. After exiting back through the common room past a grandfather clock, the camera passes through a circular stone doorway into a soaring grand hall where students relax under ornate lamps and high balconies. The scene then shifts as the camera enters a narrow, warm-lit brick tunnel that leads into a dormitory bedroom with canopy beds and hexagonal tiles, before retreating back through the tunnel into the hall. Finally, the movement concludes by gliding past potted bamboo and wooden benches toward a large, decorated door with stained glass panels.
